calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2020 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Set For Trial On Jan-11-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mark Neubauer, Esq. of CARLTON FIELDS LLP, T:310.843.6310, for defendant/moving party;
Andrew Kislik, Esq. of NASSIRI & JUNG LLP, T:415.762.3100, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. After arguments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DENDANT DUNHILL ASSET SERVICES V LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Defendant Dunhill Asset's demurrer is overruled in its entirety.

(See word minutes for the court's complete ruling.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
